title: Metals gains as signs of tightness strengthen
section_path: Metals gains as signs of tightness strengthen
section_path_text: Metals gains as signs of tightness strengthen
summary:
Main
Signs of tightness helped bolster sentiment across energy and metals. However, China's property woes continue to remain a concern. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-03-18 17.40.42.png | assets/2024-03-18_metals-gains-as-signs-of-tightness-strengthen_img_screenshot2024-03-18174042_f3b06d28b1be.png
Crude oil pushed higher last week as confidence grows of increasing tightness in the market.
